case_title: YUNIA M GUARDADO VS. EDIL JOSUE VEGA PONCE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,400.00 FILED BY GUARDADO, YUNIA M AS TO DEFENDANT VEGA PONCE, EDIL JOSUE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-08-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-02-2019 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO AUG-16-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF YUNIA M. GUARDADO IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT EDIL JOSUE VEGA PONCE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT AT 8:30 A.M. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT AT 3:30 P.M. CLERICAL ERROR WAS MADE WITH THE TIME OF TODAY'S HEARING. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-21-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-02-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF YUNIA GUARDADO IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER ANDREA ALEXANDRA POLLOCK. DEFENDANT EDIL JOSUE VEGA PONCE IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPERTER KENNETH WRIGHT. PARTIES SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT BROKE DOWN AND DEFENDANT AND FOUND SUPPORTING EVIDENCE. PLAINTIFF DIDN'T BRING DOCUMENTATION TO HEARING FOR PRO TEM TO REVIEW. ALL PARTIES ADVISED TO BRING DOCUMENTATION TO NEXT COURT HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANDREA MCGARY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO AUGUST 16, 2019 AT 3:30 P.M. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF YUNIA M. GUARDADO IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT EDIL JOSUE VEGA PONCE IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-08-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-21-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF YUNIA M. GUARDADO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY NON-COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER LUCERITO DEANDA. DEFENDANT EDIL JOSUE VEGA PONCE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER NINA SAFDIE. THE NON-CERTIFIED INTERPRETER WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETER'S OATH BY THE CLERK: R.SAHAJIAN. DEFENDANT IS TO MAKE PAYMENTS OF $500 A MONTH, WITH COURT CONTINUANCES EVERY SIX WEEKS UNTIL PAYMENTS ARE COMPLETE IN FIVE MONTHS. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF ADDRESS FOR RECEIVING MAIL. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT VEGA PONCE, EDIL JOSUE
MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-08-2019 01:30 PM FOR DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Yunia M. Guardado is present represented by Non-Court Certified Spanish Interpreter Lucerito Deanda. Defendant Edil Josue Vega Ponce is present represented by Court Certified Spanish Interpreter Nina Safdie. The non-certified interpreter was given the Interpreter's Oath by the Clerk: R.Sahajian due to shortages of Interpreters the court is experiencing at this time.
